standard: 道路構造令 Road Structure Ordinance (law text) + JRA commentary
issuer: Government of Japan / Japan Road Association
notes: FREE law text retrieved. e-Gov Law Search (official Digital Agency / MIC database) serves 道路構造令 (Cabinet Order No.320 of 1970, lawid 345CO0000000320, latest in-force version 20201125) only as HTML/XML; there is NO native PDF export (probed /api/1/pdf, /data/.pdf, api/2 response_format=pdf -> all 404/400). The authoritative law XML was fetched from the official e-Gov API v1 (https://laws.e-gov.go.jp/api/1/lawdata/345CO0000000320, HTTP 200, Result Code 0, 494726 bytes, sha256 7e0f67102bae262b7cdac04639142b7c89ebda20498142bf3c664b0768935c21, saved as JPN_Road-Structure-Ordinance_egov_official.xml) and rendered into the validated 34-page PDF (build_pdf.py). PDF validated ok=true. PAID part NOT bought: JRA commentary 道路構造令の解説と運用 (令和3年3月版), Japan Road Association, ISBN 9784889501384, list price 9,350 JPY incl. tax via Maruzen Publishing (https://www.maruzen-publishing.co.jp/item/b304179.html; currently 品切れ/out-of-stock); also sold as e-book by JRA at https://e-book.road.or.jp/products/978-4-88950-140-7.
